suspicious_activity.narrative: Tanya Johnston (ID: CUST_0018) conducted 54 transactions totaling $150,758.53 between the review period. Activity indicates structuring at High risk. Key indicators: 4 transactions in $8,000-$9,999 band, Aggregate total $150,758.53 across 54 transactions. Transactions lack clear economic purpose, consistent with suspicious activity under the Bank Secrecy Act, 31 CFR 1020.320.
key_indicators: Possible smurfing — deliberate sub-threshold structuring detected
